title: dalea mutabilis
intro: Dalea mutabilis, also known as the sensitive dalea, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant contains isoflavones, specifically genistein and daidzein, which have been studied for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dalea mutabilis include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce menopausal symptoms, and act as a natural diuretic. Dalea mutabilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is sometimes used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
